recommendations.title: The Blackwell Ghost
recommendations.overview: A filmmaker tries to prove that ghosts are real but soon regrets his intentions after he finds himself being terrorized in a haunted house by a ghost with a dark past. An authentic documentary that shows actual ghost footage that was captured on came

recommendations.title: Mourning Grave
recommendations.overview: A boy who can see ghosts moves to a small town, where he befriends a female ghost. The two work together to investigate a masked ghost who is murdering students one by one.

recommendations.title: Bhoothnath
recommendations.overview: Moving into a new house, a family witnesses an unfriendly ghost who wants to drive them away from the house. However, he befriends a little boy who changes his outlook forever.

recommendations.title: The Innocents
recommendations.overview: A young governess for two children becomes convinced that the house and grounds are haunted by ghosts and that the children are being possessed.

recommendations.title: The Telephone Box
recommendations.overview: A man gets trapped inside a telephone box and nobody is able to free him.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.

recommendations.title: Sadako vs. Kayako
recommendations.overview: A girl, Yūri Kurahashi, after watching a cursed videotape together with her friend in a haunted house, becomes trapped in a conflict between the two murderous ghosts: Sadako Yamamura and Kayako Saeki.

recommendations.title: Till Death
recommendations.overview: After a romantic evening at their secluded lake house, a woman wakes up handcuffed to her dead husband. Trapped and isolated in the dead of winter, she must fight off hired killers to escape her late spouse's twisted plan.
